## Mandatory Gate

- [ ] This PR does not add or move secrets to runtime files, nested `.env`, code, docs, tests, or screenshots.
- [ ] If retrieval, consulta, or MCP behavior changed, persistent query audit is still present or this PR is blocked.
- [ ] If file parsing changed, the path remains behind allowlist, signature/MIME validation, size limits, and quarantine/sandbox controls or this PR is blocked.
- [ ] If factual responses changed, exact citations, abstention rules, and low-confidence handling were reviewed.
- [ ] Documentation describes current state truthfully using `[IMPLEMENTED]`, `[PARTIAL]`, or `[TARGET]` where needed.
- [ ] Any schema change ships with Alembic migration or the PR is blocked.
